overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character exploring the Gothic interior of Hogwarts castle. The character walks through a grand entrance hall with a large arched window, transitions through a narrow passage, and enters a vast multi-level library before reaching a cozy reading room with a fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: library reading room with study tables

agents.ego_description: stationary view of the library study room before transitioning to the main scene

entered.detail: long wooden tables with students studying
classic green desk lamps on the tables
floor-to-ceiling bookshelves lining the walls
students in wizard robes seated at tables reading
large blue tapestry hanging on the far wall

segments.scene_description: A brief preview shot of a library reading room with students studying at wooden tables under green lamps, surrounded by tall bookshelves and tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic entrance hall with large arched window

events.description: another student in wizard robes walks from left to right across the hall
character slows and stops at the large wooden door at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grand hall toward the ornate wooden door, passing the central fountain

notable_agents.action: student walking from left to right across the hall carrying books

entered.detail: massive arched window flooding the hall with natural light
circular stone fountain in the center of the hall
sweeping stone staircase with ornate railings
Gothic stone arches with intricate carvings
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a magnificent Gothic entrance hall illuminated by a massive arched window. A stone fountain sits in the center while a grand staircase rises to the right. Another student crosses the hall from the left as the character approaches the far door.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between two wooden doors

events.description: character opens the large wooden door and enters the narrow dimly lit passage
character opens the second door at the end of the passage revealing the library

agents.ego_description: opening doors and walking through the confined passage between the grand hall and library

entered.detail: close wooden paneled walls of the narrow corridor
single lantern hanging from the ceiling providing dim light
heavy wooden door with metal studs at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a brief transitional sequence, opening the heavy wooden door to enter a narrow dimly lit passage with a hanging lantern, then opening a second door to access the library.

scene_state.functional_zone: vast multi-level library with towering bookshelves

events.description: character emerges from the passage into the expansive library space
another student becomes visible walking ahead in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand library, observing the towering bookshelves and spiral staircase ahead

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead toward the spiral staircase

entered.detail: massive multi-story bookshelves reaching to the vaulted ceiling
elegant wooden spiral staircase leading to upper levels
long wooden tables with reading lamps for studying
ornate iron gates securing some book sections
large chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast awe-inspiring library with towering bookshelves, a spiral staircase, and reading tables. The space is illuminated by chandeliers and wall sconces. Another student walks ahead in the distance as the character explores the main aisle.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate reading room with lit fireplace

events.description: character enters the smaller side reading room through an archway
character stops near the fireplace, ending the movement

agents.ego_description: entering the cozy reading room and approaching the warm fireplace

entered.detail: stone fireplace with active flames providing warm light
upholstered armchair positioned before the fireplace
framed portrait hanging above the mantelpiece
green ceramic vases on the mantelpiece

segments.scene_description: The character enters a smaller intimate reading room featuring a lit fireplace, comfortable armchair, and portrait above the mantel. The warm firelight contrasts with the cooler library lighting as the character approaches the hearth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the grand, open architecture of a Gothic entrance hall into the intimate, warm sanctuary of a private reading room. It begins with a glimpse of students studying under green lamps before shifting to a magnificent hall illuminated by a massive arched window, where the camera moves past a central stone fountain and a rising staircase toward a distant door. As the character passes through this exit, the scene transitions through a narrow, dimly lit passage lit by a single hanging lantern before opening into a vast, awe-inspiring library filled with towering bookshelves and spiral staircases. The camera then glides through the main aisle under the glow of chandeliers, finally turning into a smaller, cozy reading room where the cool library light gives way to the warm flicker of a lit fireplace and a comfortable armchair.
